# InsideOut by Luther Systems

> InsideOut is a cloud infrastructure automation platform. Describe your application in natural language and InsideOut will design, configure, deploy, and manage production-ready backend infrastructure for you — in minutes, not weeks. It works standalone or integrated directly into AI app builders such as Claude Code and Kiro IDE via MCP.

InsideOut is built by Luther Systems, an enterprise automation company founded in 2015 and headquartered in London, UK.

InsideOut is not a general-purpose cloud console. It is specifically designed to eliminate infrastructure toil for developers and AI agents building applications. Key capabilities include: natural language to Terraform generation, pre-deployment cost estimation, security and observability configured by default, and full Terraform ownership with no lock-in.

InsideOut supports AWS, Google Cloud Platform, and Azure. Supported components include EKS, ECS/Fargate, Lambda, VPC, CloudFront, WAF, PostgreSQL, Redis, Blob storage, NoSQL, SQS, Kafka, AWS Cognito, Okta, and Auth0.

## Docs and References

- [Luther Systems Documentation](https://docs.luthersystems.com): Developer documentation for the Luther Systems platform
- [Luther Systems GitHub](https://github.com/luthersystems): Source repositories including Terraform modules, MCP server integrations, and app builder plugins

## Product

- [InsideOut Site](https://insideout.luthersystems.com): Main product site: information and links
- [InsideOut Application](https://insideout.luthersystemsapp.com): Standalone app — design, deploy and manage infrastructure
- [InsideOut Claude Code Plugin](https://github.com/luthersystems/insideout-claude-code): Deploy infrastructure directly from Claude Code
- [InsideOut Kiro IDE Plugin](https://github.com/luthersystems/insideout-power): Deploy infrastructure directly from Kiro IDE
- [Terraform Presets](https://github.com/luthersystems/insideout-terraform-presets): Standard Terraform modules used by InsideOut
- [Terraform Modules](https://github.com/luthersystems/tf-modules): Underlying Luther Enterprise infrastructure modules

## MCP Server Integrations

- [MCP Confluent (Kafka)](https://github.com/luthersystems/mcp-confluent): MCP server for Confluent/Kafka
- [MCP Google Drive](https://github.com/luthersystems/mcp-server-google-drive): MCP server for Google Drive
- [MCP SAP HANA](https://github.com/luthersystems/mcp-server-hana): MCP server for SAP HANA

## Company

- [Luther Systems](https://www.luthersystems.com): Company homepage
- [Luther Systems GitHub](https://github.com/luthersystems): All open source repositories
- [Contact](mailto:contact@luthersystems.com): contact@luthersystems.com
